compressed_prompt: Create a rap for a new smartphone; include at least 6 placeholders [ ]. P.P.S. Add a postscript starting with "P.P.S.
response:
**(Beat drops with a futuristic synth loop)**

Yo, check the blueprint, the main event, the new king
This ain't no incremental, minor thing
Pull it from your pocket, feel the **[Sleek Material Name]** gleam
Powered by the **[Proprietary Chipset]**, a processor supreme.

Unlock the future with a **[Biometric Tech Name]** scan
Capture every moment with the **[Camera System Name]** plan.
Low-light shots look clearer than your actual vision
Recordin' in **[High-Res Video Format]**, a filmmaker's mission.

Battery life? A **[Large Battery Capacity]** beast
From dawn to the after-party, the power never ceased.
And the display? A **[Screen Tech Name]** so bright and vast
Every color, every detail, built to outlast.

It's more than an app launcher, it's your **[AI Assistant Name]** hub
Makin' life seamless, from the office to the club.
So pre-order now, don't you hesitate or lag
This is the **[Smartphone Model Name]**, the ultimate flag.

**P.P.S. And if you act now, it comes with a free, matching **[Fashionable Case Brand]** tag.**
